topic: Managing Employee Bank Details and Payment Mode for Salary
summary: This topic covers how to enter and manage an employee's bank account details and specify their preferred salary payment mode (e.g., RTGS, Cheque) within their employee record.
steps: Click on the employee's record to 'View' their details.
Enter the employee's 'Bank Name', 'Branch', 'Account Number', and any other relevant bank information.
In the 'Payment Mode' field, specify the method of payment, such as 'RTGS' or 'Cheque'.
Save the employee's details to apply the changes.
business_rules: The bank details (Bank Name, Branch, Account Number) entered in this section will be reflected on the employee's salary slip.
The specified payment mode will be saved permanently for the employee, eliminating the need to re-enter it each month.
important_notes: These details are crucial for accurate salary disbursement and for generating comprehensive salary slips.
If a dedicated 'Payment Mode' field is not available, the payment method can be noted in the 'Remarks' section of the employee's salary details.
questions: How do I update an employee's bank account information for salary payments?
Where can I specify if an employee's salary should be paid via cheque or RTGS?
Will the employee's bank details appear on their salary slip?
Do I need to enter payment mode details every month?
